summary: Planned non-mutating security routing only. Validator identified #65201 as security-sensitive; because the only open candidate concerns gateway auth token SecretRef handling and token availability diagnostics, ProjectClownfish should quarantine that exact issue for central OpenClaw security handling instead of keeping it canonical in backlog cleanup.
